summary: Successfully tested CuratedCloset landing page NEW copy requirements - all specified text and functionality working perfectly

Admin login with password 'curatedcloset2025' works correctly
Analytics dashboard loads and displays after successful admin login
Mobile responsive layout works perfectly at 390px width
All backend API endpoints working (100% success rate - 11/11 tests passed)
